notable_excerpts: We have already achieved 36% electricity consumption from RE. And we have target to achieve 50% before December 2025.
Net Water Positive by 2030 and Zero Waste to Landfill status by 2030, Net Zero emission by 2047.
In Scope 1 emissions, we have achieved 40.61% reduction. And in Scope 2, 5.23% reduction and 21% increase in emission offset compared to FY '24.
We have now first ICT with ester oil in power grid 132/33kV, 10 MVA ICT at HVDC Pusauli has been successfully charged after retro filling with natural ester oil.
We have commissioned 85-megawatt Solar PV power project at Nagda which was commissioned in April 2025.
In CSR activities, we have Vishram Sadan at AIIMS, Bilaspur, 250 bedded which was inaugurated.
Skill development center at Bassi, Banka, Malda, these are also under CSR.
THIRA, meaning Waves is a skill development program for unemployed youth from Trivandrum’ fisherfolk communities offering divemaster and rescue diver training.
Our women leaders also have been recognized. We have been recognized as Best Enterprise Maharatna company, second runner up at 35th National meet of Women in Public Sector.
Today, we have our Board members, 4 functional directors, 2 Government Nominee Directors, 3 Independent Directors.
We have been getting MoU rating as ‘Excellent’ since 1993-94.
Our domestic and international credit rating has been excellent and at par with the Sovereign rating.
We have dedicated ROW and land acquisition cells at Gurgaon, where all the ROW issues being faced by site are addressed from here.

chain_of_thought: The environmental disclosures are strong, with specific targets and achievements in renewable energy and emission reductions. Social initiatives focus on community and skill development, with recognition of employee contributions. Governance is robust, with emphasis on board independence and risk management. Overall, the ESG disclosures are comprehensive and positive.
strengths: Clear targets and achievements in renewable energy and emissions.
Strong community and skill development programs.
Robust governance structure with independent directors.
weaknesses: Limited specific details on diversity and inclusion initiatives.
Potential risks in capex expectations due to regulatory changes.
